title: External Activity Dashboard Integration
description: Dashboard should sync with external activity - show active external activity on the stopwatch, log external activities, and resume external activity after internal activity ends.

title: Remove Timeline Select from External Page
description: Remove the dropdown timeline selector from External page - it should use the top nav timeline instead.

title: Edit External Activities
description: Ability to edit external activities - name, type, icon, color, and delete.

title: Stopwatch Randomly Resets to 0
description: Stopwatch on dashboard randomly goes to 0 and shows "Paused" state.

title: Detect App Tracker Electron App
description: DeskFlow/Electron app was being hidden from tracking. Want it to show when user opens the app.

title: External Activity Settings Removed from Dashboard
description: Remove the tracking mode toggle (Always On / On Interaction) from the external activity controls on dashboard.

title: Timer Container Width Fixed
description: Main timer section had awkward width that didn't follow any pattern.

title: Focus/Total Toggle Position Fixed
description: Focus/Total toggle position was being affected by adjacent text length.

title: Remove Browser Blacklist from App Tracking
description: Remove the hardcoded exclusion of tracking browser (Comet Browser) from application tracking. Browser app should be included in app page stats.

title: Solar System Toggle Opens Full View
description: Clicking App/Website toggle on Dashboard solar system was opening the full solar system modal.

title: Bigger Modal Sizes & Fullscreen
description: Heatmap and Solar System modals were too small. Add fullscreen option for solar system.

title: Generic Agent Instructions
description: Create a separate generic agent instructions file that can be reused across projects.

title: Create Requests.md for Tracking
description: Create a requests tracking file to log all user requests with history.

title: Stopwatch Stuck / Not Counting (FINAL FIX)
description: "the stopwatch o nteh dashboard is not working properly. its stuck and doesnt want to count properly."

title: Start/Stop AI Sessions from Sidebar UI
description: "We need to be able to start/stop AI sessions from the sidebar UI. Select AI type (Claude, OpenCode, etc.), set parameters, and click Start from the control panel on the right. The sidebar should be the main control interface, not the terminal itself. Terminal is secondary."

title: Terminal Tab Shows Correct AI Agent Type
description: "The terminal tab shows 'Cloud' hardcoded but I'm using OpenCode. It should show the actual AI agent type for each terminal."

title: Add New Terminal Button (+) Actually Creates Terminals
description: "Clicking the '+' button to add a new terminal doesn't work. It should create a new terminal session."

title: Sidebar Terminals Tab Shows Running & Recent Sessions
description: "Sidebar should show list of sessions: running terminals with status, and recent/closed sessions that can be resumed."

title: Unlimited Sidebar Width + Remove 600px Limit
description: "Sidebar should resize freely - no maximum width limit. It should be expandable to full screen if needed."

title: Send Button Connects to Terminal PTY
description: "Send button at bottom of terminal should actually execute commands in the terminal, not just send text."

title: Session Resume Works Properly
description: "Resume session button should reconnect to running session, not just send a command."

title: Delete Session Confirmation
description: "Deleting a session should show confirmation and actually remove it from database."

title: New Session Dialog with AI Selector
description: "Should be able to create new session from Sessions tab with AI type selector."

title: Session Agent Type Display in Terminal Tab
description: "Terminal tab bar should show actual AI agent for each terminal, not hardcoded 'Cloud'."

title: Terminal Session Label Shows Project + Agent
description: "Terminal session label should show project name and AI agent clearly."

title: Verify Sidebar Width Resizable
description: "Sidebar resize handle should work smoothly and allow dragging to any width."

title: File Page Shows Only Selected Project Files
description: "When I select a project and open workspace, the File page should show ONLY that project's files. Currently it shows all projects which is broken."

title: Send Instruction Input Actually Sends to Terminal
description: "The 'Send' button at bottom of screen doesn't do anything. When I type a command and click Send, it should execute in the terminal."

title: Load INITIALIZE.md on Project Setup
description: "When setting up a project workspace, automatically load and execute INITIALIZE.md into the terminal. This sets up the AI with project context and allows it to track progress."

title: Project Switcher in Workspace Header
description: "Need quick project switcher dropdown in workspace header to switch between projects without leaving workspace."

title: Problems "Assigned to Terminal" Actually Works
description: "When assigning a problem to a terminal, it should send the problem description to that terminal. Currently nothing happens."

title: Requests Tab Parses and Shows Assigned Terminals
description: "Requests tab should parse REQUESTS.md and show which terminals are assigned to each request. Currently shows nothing."

title: System Prompt Customization Page
description: "Create settings page where I can customize system prompt for each AI type. Currently it's hardcoded with random tokens."

title: Terminal & Session List with Full Metadata
Terminal UI Labels Show Correct Info
